headline: Trump's Iran War Boomerangs Back Into American Housing — Mortgage Rates Hit 7% Again
summary: Benchmark mortgage rates hit 7% again, per Barchart, as Trump's Iran war drives oil, inflation fears & bond yields higher—putting pressure on housing.
